sourcesContent:
const About = () => { return (

About myAPOD

Begun in 1995 by Robert Nemiroff and Jerry Bonnell, Astronomy Picture of the Day (APOD) is one of NASA's most popular public programs. Each day of the week features a different image, photograph, or video of our amazing universe, along with a brief explanation by a professional astronomer.

As for this site, it was begun mid-January by some web dev hobbyist who happens to like astronomy. It was mostly for practice, but I hope you find some value out of it, too!

I'm hoping to add likes, personal profiles to save favorites, and more in the future. If something isn't updated or sucks, my bad (I'm improving though, I swear!)

Here's some useful links you may like to explore:

  • THE APOD website!
  • NASA's official site
  • Hubble Heritage, a collection of Hubble images
) } export default About
